scene.message: Nanjo: Hm?{nl} Something's lying there.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Ah!{nl} It's Mai's compact!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Good idea.{nl} Inaba, give it a try.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: ...{wait_fr:30}...{wait_fr:30}...{wait_fr:60}{nl} Nothing's happening.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Nothing for it.{nl} Let's go on foot.{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{waitkey}{ret}
It's locked.{waitkey}{ret}
Obtained the Half Compact.{waitkey}{ret}
